title: Canada Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2024
content:
Key Takeaways:

The ZEV market saw strong growth in Q3 2024, with a 5.67% YoY rise in vehicle sales and ZEV penetration reaching 15.65%. BEVs led the market with a 28.07% YoY increase, while PHEVs surged by 43.58% YoY. Quebec and British Columbia remained key ZEV adopters, with the Northwest Territories recording the highest QoQ growth.
author: Mansift Kaur
